## Summary

Describe the focused change and its user-visible effect.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] Relevant manual verification completed or explained below

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] Tests, fixtures, screenshots, and logs contain only synthetic or sanitized data
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, MFA codes, private keys, workspace contents, or production user data are included
- [ ] Installation, permissions, storage, authentication, support, and capture docs were updated if behavior changed

## Notes

List skipped checks, known limitations, or follow-up work. Write `None` when
there are none.
